text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide has a severe injury, so I cancel
practice and go visit her to drop some things off.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Hello! If you're looking for Hayahide, she left for
the gym a little while ago.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I didn't think... this injury would... affect me so much...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I know. I'm sorry, but please, don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I suffered a major injury as a child, so I know what
a setback it can be.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's why I don't want to waste any time. I want
to continue refining my equations instead.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll pay close attention to my injury while still
carrying out my calculations, so please...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Please don't stop me from progressing!
choice_data_list: We need to go back to the infirmary.

If you're so intent on doing this... then we'll do
it together!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...I see. So I have no choice but to stand still as
everyone sprints on ahead again...
choice_data_list: If your injury gets worse, you'll never catch up to them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You're right. I know that... Intellectually, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know I can't make the same mistake I did in the
past. But...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No, never mind. I'll do as you say.

Biwa Hayahide struggles mightily with her fears of
falling behind, but agrees to rest and recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... Thank you for understanding. Let's
get started!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah!
Thud!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine... I just... I just tripped.

Biwa Hayahide is so overwrought by her first
injury that she ends up giving herself another. It'll
take even longer for her to heal now...

After that, I start working with her on testing out
her calculations.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see... According to this heart rate... the amount
of muscular exertion decreased, just as I
predicted.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Phew... Well, that was productive. I even learned about things unrelated to my calculations.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I realized that I have other advantages besides
my analytical skills. I have someone beside me,
willing to go over theories and calculations
together, all for the sake of improvement.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What I'm saying is... that you're incredibly
important to me. I can't wait to start training
again.
